title: metapolypodium fieldingianum
intro: Metapolypodium fieldingianum, also known as Fielding's Metapolypodium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, which is a type of fern. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Metapolypodium fieldingianum are believed to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion to be used medicinally, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
